parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $json.message || 'Unauthorized: Invalid or missing API key' }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH tenant_context AS (SELECT set_config('app.current_tenant_id', $1, true) AS tenant_ctx)
SELECT id, embedding FROM memory_vectors
CROSS JOIN tenant_context
WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND scope = $2 AND content_hash = $3
LIMIT 1;

parameters.json: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Cache hit - embedding already exists", cached: true, id: $input.first().json.cached_id }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO memory_vectors (
  tenant_id,
  scope,
  content,
  embedding,
  tags,
  source,
  content_hash,
  metadata_jsonb,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4::vector,
  $5::jsonb,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, scope, content_hash)
WHERE content_hash IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding,
  tags = EXCLUDED.tags,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  metadata_jsonb = EXCLUDED.metadata_jsonb
RETURNING id, content_hash;

additionalFields.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $input.first().json.tenant_id,
  $input.first().json.scope,
  $input.first().json.text,
  $input.first().json.embedding,
  JSON.stringify($input.first().json.tags || []),
  String($input.first().json.source || 'unknown'),
  $input.first().json.content_hash,
  JSON.stringify({
    request_id: $input.first().json.request_id || null,
    source: $input.first().json.source || 'unknown',
    tags: $input.first().json.tags || [],
    facts_count: Array.isArray($input.first().json.facts) ? $input.first().json.facts.length : 0,
    metadata: $input.first().json.metadata || {},
    policy: $input.first().json.policy || {}
  })
] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_events (actor, action, target, decision, created_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW());

parameters.json: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Memory ingested", cached: false, facts_stored: $input.all()[0].json.facts.length }) }}
